creator: dag-erli@ifi.uio.no
text:
Bill Fenner <fenner@parc.xerox.com> writes:
> I noticed.  Why is the name change required?  A desire to have subtle
> and confusing differences between FreeBSD and the BPF distribution?

Because it's more consistent. The bpf code refers to itself as 'bpf'
(re. probe messages), the man page is called bpf, the device nodes are
called bpf, etc. To quote Jordan, "this change is long overdue".

DES
-- 
Dag-Erling Smørgrav - dag-erli@ifi.uio.no
